event: The Consecration of Decius Mus before battle
description: A painting depicting a scene from ancient Roman history. An elderly bearded figure in golden-yellow robes (a Roman priest or augur) stands at center left beside a veiled woman, performing a ritual gesture. A man in a rich red cloak bows before him in an act of consecration. Roman soldiers with helmets, spears, and a white horse stand at the right. The scene takes place outdoors beneath a large tree with a moody sky. The composition conveys a solemn moment of ritual dedication or oath-taking before battle.
